chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Rev. Appln No.61 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection as at A. 2. For hearing of case. 3. For hearing of MA No.3553/2022. 4. For hearing of MA No.7965/2022. 5. For hearing of MA No.7986/2022. 08.09.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- The applicant and his counsel are called absent. Same was the case on the last date of hearing. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing this revision application. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
